The Runway

look1 | The Grand Entrance

Current Phase

      Pre-Sale Extravaganza(Current stage)

      Darling, I’m in a 30-day presale that’s more exclusive than a front-row seat at Fashion Week. Only the crème de la crème can join with BASE, SOL, BNB, ETH, USDT, and USDC. Consider it your golden ticket to the elite club.

      Community Building

      I’m not just gathering followers; I’m curating a chic community of trendsetters and tastemakers. Think social media glam, dazzling AMAs, and exclusive presale soirées.

look2 | The Fabulous Launch(60 mins after presale)

      DECENTRALIZED EXCHANGE LISTINGS

      Within 60 minutes post post-presale, I'll be strutting my stuff on Raydium, ensuring I'm the center of attention with maximum visibility and liquidity.

      TOKEN DISTRIBUTION

      In true Poodlana fashion, all tokens will be 100% unlocked from day one. Transparency and fairness are my middle names—no lock-ups, no vesting periods, just pure, unadulterated Poodlana.

look3 | Glamorous Growth

      EXCHANGE PARTNERSHIPS

      After my dazzling DEX debut, I’ll be gracing centralized exchanges, making sure even the most traditional traders can bask in my glory. Why keep my fans waiting?

      MARKETING BLITZ

      Get ready for a marketing campaign that will be the talk of the town. I’m teaming up with top influencers, high-end fashion brands, and lifestyle platforms to spread the Poodlana gospel far and wide.

look4 | Innovation and Expansion

      STAKING PLATFORM

      Introducing a chic staking platform where holders can earn fabulous rewards just for being part of the Poodlana elite.

      EXCLUSIVE AIRDROPS AND BONUSES

      Rolling out surprise airdrops and bonuses tied to special events and milestones, because every fabulous moment deserves a little extra sparkle.

look5 | The Long-Term Vision

      GLOBAL OUTREACH

      Taking the Poodlana phenomenon global, with a particular focus on dazzling Asia. Think international partnerships, multi-language support, and appearances at the most glamorous global events.

      POODLE PHILANTHROPY

      And let’s not forget, darling—compassion is always in vogue. I’ll be making the world a better place for our far less fortunate furry friends through dedicated philanthropic efforts.

Total supply1,000,000,000

Fashionomics

It’s time for sustainable fashion and it’s time to give your wallet a refresh. Clear out your old alts and purchase Poodlana, no one wants to be seen with last season's holdings or dare to miss out. This season we’ve got the balance right to be the next big coin.

Exchange Wishlist

To my kitsch community, I'm giving away $10,000 in hundred-dollar bills! Win $100 by joining my latest campaign. Paris, New York, Milan, Poodlana has conquered them all, and now it's time to make our mark on the exchanges.

I have quite a long wishlist, and I am already targeting them all in different ways. This includes Binance, Gate, BitGet, MEXC, ByBit, OKX, Kucoin, Bithumb, CoinOne and Korbit.

The Tweets below will alter periodically based on how I want to target my wishlist, keep checking here to see the latest. To enter, based on my current selection, copy the text below, paste to twitter and Tweet.

  • Be fabulous @binance, list @Poodlana

  • Be gorgeous @kucoincom, list @Poodlana

  • Be chic @BithumbOfficial, list @Poodlana

Each tweet counts as an entry, and the more you tweet, the better your chances! Just like my evenings back in Studio 54, multiple entries are not only accepted but energetically encouraged. We're giving away $10,000 with multiple winners each receiving $100! Tweets will be selected at random, so get tagging, darlings!

Let's go on a high-fashion raid and make Poodlana trend!

twitter

Of course darling, after all isn't fashion once it reaches the rack about seeking the approval of others? We have been thoroughly audited by Solid Proof. Who would we be without the Solid Proof stamp of approval.

7/24 Holder Care

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I contact the project?
The project can be contacted at contact@poodlana.com
Where can I purchase POODL?
You can purchase POODL from and only from Poodlana.com, we’re so highly couture and hot off the runway that our exclusive presale collection of 500,000,000 tokens can only be bought from us.
Where will the project be listed?
The project will be listed on Raydium 60 minutes after the presale ends. In another exciting development, we have just signed a deal to list on one of the top exchanges in the world. We will do this shortly after the Raydium launch.
We are not allowed to say who based on the exchanges confidentiality terms, but I look forward to dazzling you all soon.
Is there multiple language support?
Naturally we found our creative home in Asia with the Poodle craze, we have Korean / Japanese specific channels inside Telegram and we also have multiple language Twitter channels. Moderators inside our Telegram can help with multiple language support.
Is the project audited?
Of course darling, after all isn’t fashion once it reaches the rack about seeking the approval of others? We have been thoroughly audited by Solid Proof, and our team has been KYC'd too. Who would we be without the Solid Proof stamp of approval? You can view the results of the audit here.SolidProof Report
How to List Poodlana?
Interested in listing us? Of course you are, darling! Who wouldn’t want me plastered all over their exchange, bringing the glam? Looking for a Pooch in Finance? Blonde fur, Crufts size. Simply email listing@poodlana.com and I’ll have my assistant get in touch.
